# Baptiste Grosjean

> AI Software Crafter Lead and Computer Science MSc student at UMons (Belgium). Founder of Acteble (Flutter mobile app + Rust backend). Based in Kraainem, Belgium. Experienced in software craftsmanship (clean code, clean architecture, DDD), AI integration, and full-stack development across Rust, Flutter, .NET, Python, and TypeScript.

This is the personal portfolio and CV of Baptiste Grosjean, published at https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com. The canonical machine-readable CV is exposed as JSON Resume v1.0.0 and mirrored in XML and PDF.

For programmatic ingestion, prefer the JSON Resume file (`/assets/data/resume.json`) which is the authoritative source of truth for all CV fields. The Markdown digest (`/llms-full.txt`) is a flat text alternative.

## Data

- [Resume — JSON Resume v1.0.0](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/assets/data/resume.json): Canonical structured CV (basics, work, education, skills, projects, volunteer, languages, references)
- [Resume — XML](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/assets/data/resume.xml): XML mirror of the same data
- [CV — PDF (English)](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/assets/cv/cv_grosjean_baptiste_en.pdf): Printable English CV
- [CV — PDF (Français)](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/assets/cv/cv_grosjean_baptiste_fr.pdf)
- [CV — PDF (Nederlands)](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/assets/cv/cv_grosjean_baptiste_nl.pdf)
- [CV — PDF (Español)](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/assets/cv/cv_grosjean_baptiste_es.pdf)

## Content

- [Portfolio site — English](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/): Full portfolio with all sections rendered (canonical)
- [Portfolio site — Français](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/fr/): French version
- [Portfolio site — Nederlands](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/nl/): Dutch version
- [Portfolio site — Español](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/es/): Spanish version
- [Portfolio site — Deutsch](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/de/): German version
- [Portfolio site — 简体中文](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/zh/): Simplified Chinese version
- [Full Markdown digest](https://www.grosjeanbaptiste.com/llms-full.txt): Flat single-file CV in Markdown (English), ideal for LLM context windows

The site is published in four languages (en, fr, nl, es). All variants are derived from the same canonical `resume.json` by overlaying language-specific text in `assets/data/i18n/<lang>.json`. JSON-LD `inLanguage` and `hreflang` are emitted on every page.

## Optional

- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/grosjeanbaptiste): Public repositories
- [LinkedIn profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/grosjeanbaptiste): Professional network
- [JSON Resume registry](https://registry.jsonresume.org/grosjeanbaptiste): Hosted CV powered by the `jsonresume-theme-grosjeanbaptiste` NPM theme
- [Acteble](https://www.acteble.com): Current venture
